name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-assisted presentation builder that produces polished decks without the generic, over-designed look of typical AI output.
problem: Most AI presentation tools generate visually cluttered or generic slides that require heavy manual cleanup before they look professional. Teams waste time fighting templated aesthetics and correcting AI-hallucinated content structures. Chronicle 2.0 aims to give users AI speed with human-quality design control.
useCases: Building investor pitch decks with clean, brand-consistent visuals
Creating internal business update presentations quickly without design resources
Producing client-facing proposal decks that don't look AI-generated
Turning reports or documents into structured slide narratives
